title: The Adventure
overview: From Viridian Forest to Terminus Cave, see the Pokémon world as never before!

title: The Chase
overview: Detective Looker of the International Police uncovers critical information in the hunt for Team Rocket Boss Giovanni!

title: The Challenger
overview: A new challenger approaches to test his abilities against the Kanto region’s Elite Four. Will he prove himself worthy?

title: The Lake of Rage
overview: With rumors of a Red Gyarados rampaging in the Lake of Rage, Lance of the Elite Four decides to investigate.

title: The Legacy
overview: In the wake of Team Rocket’s takeover of the Goldenrod Radio Tower, Detective Looker’s investigation leads him to an enigmatic young Trainer.

title: The Reawakening
overview: The mysterious traveler Eusine explores the legends of Ecruteak City’s Burned Tower and the Pokémon who rose from its ashes.

title: The Vision
overview: When an uninvited guest breaks into their headquarters, Team Magma must race against time to make their ambitions a reality.

title: The Cavern
overview: Deep under the sea, Team Aqua’s leader is about to achieve his greatest goal. Can one voice of reason turn the tide of destruction?

title: The Scoop
overview: While the Hoenn region rejoices after avoiding meteoric destruction, reporter Gabby and her cameraman Ty uncover the story of a lifetime.

title: The Old Chateau
overview: Late at night, a young traveler and her Chansey lose their way in Eterna Forest. They soon stumble upon a house—but what waits inside?

title: The New World
overview: With the beginnings of a new universe laid out before him, Cyrus of Team Galactic faces extreme opposition. But aid arrives in an unusual form.

title: The Magma Stone
overview: The remnants of Team Galactic have awakened Heatran deep within Stark Mountain. Who can stop their burning ambitions from erupting into catastrophe?

title: The Uprising
overview: With the ascension of their king and the fall of the Pokémon League, Team Plasma is poised to take control—until the Gym Leaders arrive!

title: The Frozen World
overview: Gym Leader Drayden prepares to defend Opelucid City against Team Plasma, but the true nature of their plans will chill him to his very core.

title: The King Returns
overview: His plans left in ruins, Ghetsis makes one last attempt to bring Unova under his icy grasp. A hero arrives, intending to stop him.

title: The Beauty Eternal
overview: Scientist. Entrepreneur. Visionary. Take a closer look at the man whose acts have redefined the Kalos region: Lysandre.

title: The Investigation
overview: Detective Looker’s assistants Emma and Mimi have been helping him out in Lumiose City, until a crime wave threatens to tear them apart.

title: The Redemption
overview: A new champion rises. An ancient king returns. A sorrow that has lasted 3,000 years is brought to an end.
